# 🌍 Code of Conduct

## 🤝 Our Pledge

We pledge to make GradeEvaluator AI a
harassment-free experience for everyone
regardless of age, ethnicity, gender,
experience level or nationality.

---

## ✅ Expected Behavior

- Be kind, respectful and inclusive
- Use professional and welcoming language
- Give and accept constructive feedback
- Show empathy toward others
- Credit others for their contributions

## ❌ Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment or discriminatory comments
- Trolling or disruptive behavior
- Sharing others' private information
- Personal or political attacks

---

## 🚨 Enforcement

Report violations to:
📧 **gemachistesfaye36@gmail.com**

All reports are reviewed promptly and
handled with full confidentiality.

| Severity | Consequence |
|---|---|
| 🟡 Minor | Written warning |
| 🟠 Moderate | Temporary suspension |
| 🔴 Severe | Permanent ban |

---

## 📜 Attribution

Adapted from the
[Contributor Covenant v2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct.html)
